category_sources: source_facts.description: international domain name library with IDNA2008, Punycode, and TR46; official GNU Libidn2 manual describes IDNA2008/TR46.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libidn2; official GNU documentation title is Libidn2.
docs_sources: Official GNU Libidn2 manual and reference manual are hosted under gnu.org/software/libidn/libidn2.
repo_sources: Official Savannah Git page for GNU Libidn lists libidn/libidn2.git and its clone URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names IDNA2008, Punycode, and TR46; official GNU manual describes Libidn2 as IDNA2008/TR46 implementation.
